title: Executive Order 6057—Authorizing the Appointment of Clara L. Hess
text:
Clara L. Hess, who, since March 16, 1927, has been serving in a position in the Post Office Department excepted from civil-service requirements, may be appointed in the classified civil service without compliance with civil-service rules.
This order is issued upon the recommendation of the Postmaster General.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
March 1, 1933.
